summary: Iteration 61: Push Notifications and Quantum Mechanics Integration tested. All 29 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend features verified: Landing page quantum tagline, notification bell in navigation, notification settings panel with toggle and preferences, VR page with Quantum Cosmic Sanctuary title, Quantum Field portal, and Quantum Realm journey.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 complete. Push Notifications and Quantum Mechanics integration verified: (1) GET /api/notifications/vapid-public-key returns valid VAPID key (87 chars). (2) POST /api/notifications/subscribe saves subscription with endpoint and keys. (3) GET /api/notifications/status returns subscribed flag, subscription_count, and preferences (daily_relaxation, cosmic_insights, practice_reminders). (4) POST /api/notifications/preferences updates preferences and returns updated values. (5) POST /api/notifications/send-test returns sent count. (6) DELETE /api/notifications/unsubscribe removes subscription. (7) GET /api/ai-visuals/quantum-principles returns 8 principles (superposition, entanglement, wave_particle_duality, observer_effect, quantum_tunneling, uncertainty_principle, quantum_coherence, zero_point_field), 3 meditations (Superposition Stillness, Quantum Entanglement, Quantum Tunneling), and future_tech hooks. (8) GET /api/coach/modes returns 6 quantum-enhanced modes (spiritual, life, shadow, manifestation, healing, dream_oracle). (9) Landing page shows quantum tagline 'Where Quantum Consciousness Meets Ancient Wisdom' and subtitle 'where physics and spirit converge'. (10) Notification bell visible in navigation when logged in. (11) Notification settings panel opens with Enable Notifications toggle. (12) VR page shows 'Quantum Cosmic Sanctuary' title. (13) VR page shows 'Quantum Field' portal in bottom navigation. (14) VR journey picker shows 'The Quantum Realm' journey with description 'Journey into the subatomic cosmos — where physics and consciousness merge'. VAPID keys configured in backend/.env.

frontend_landing_page.Quantum tagline visible: PASS - 'Where Quantum Consciousness Meets Ancient Wisdom'

frontend_vr_page.Quantum Realm description: PASS - 'Journey into the subatomic cosmos — where physics and consciousness merge'
